title: Revised protocol for assessing exposure to sweeteners as part of their safety assessment under the food additives re-evaluation programme
author: European Food Safety Authority
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The original protocol was approved by the FAF Panel on 23 July 2020 and it was originally published as EFSA supporting publication on 11 August 2020, as Annex of the Technical report. Outcome of the public consultation on a draft protocol for assessing exposure to sweeteners as part of their safety assessment under the food additives re-evaluation programme. EFSA supporting publication 2020: EN-1913. 16 pp. doi:10.2903/sp.efsa.2020. EN-1913.
